spec.name: Mind Move Ring
spec.summary: repositions mind energy in a ring perimeter with active regulation while it runs
spec.effect_description: The caster inscribes a sigil that repositions mind energy in a ring perimeter with active regulation while it runs. Effect range: line-of-sight. Persistence: timed long.
